blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Requires manual real-iPhone Home permission prompt validation; simulator/xcodebuild cannot prove system Apple Home authorization prompt.
Requires manual real-iPhone denied/restricted Home access validation evidence.
Requires manual real-iPhone validation for no-Home-configured Apple Home state.
Requires manual real-iPhone validation for missing home hub state.
Requires manual real-iPhone validation for no-compatible-accessories state.
Requires manual real-iPhone validation that successful live Apple Home access lands in usable setup state.

orchestratorNotes.summary: User-testing overridden to allow Milestone 2 progress.
orchestratorNotes.justification: The user explicitly chose to override the blocked real-device onboarding assertions and move to Milestone 2. Assertions VAL-ONBOARD-002 through VAL-ONBOARD-007 were deferred to feature dawnloop-onboarding-real-device-validation-followup and reset to pending in validation-state.json.
